company.description: The Company API allows you to look up a company by their domain

person.description: The Person API lets you retrieve social information associated with an email address, such as a person’s name, location and Twitter handle

autocomplete.description: Auto-complete company names and retrieve logo and domain

enrich.description: Look up a person and company data based on an email or domain

facebook.description: The Facebook URL for the person

linkedin.description: The LinkedIn URL for the company

twitter.description: The Twitter handle for the person

company.description: The name of the person’s employer

companyDomain.description: The domain for the person’s employer

familyName.description: Last name of person. If you have this, passing this is strongly recommended to improve match rates.

ipAddress.description: IP address of the person. If you have this, passing this is strongly recommended to improve match rates.

location.description: The city or country where the person resides

linkedIn.description: The LinkedIn URL for the person

name.description: Name is the partial name of the company

email.description: The email address to look up
